name: NABOTHIAN CYST
definition: most common benign masslike lesion of cervix

demographics.Size: < 1 cm (majority); may enlarge to become symptomatic

dominant_finding: may increase in echogenicity ← proteinaceous / hemorrhagic content
discriminating_features: simple anechoic cyst without vascularity (incidentally detected at imaging)
may increase in echogenicity ← proteinaceous / hemorrhagic content
"tunnel cluster" (in up to 8%) = multicystic dilatation of endocervical glands mimicking

general: simple anechoic cyst without vascularity (incidentally detected at imaging)
may increase in echogenicity ← proteinaceous / hemorrhagic content
